name: Mango Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 whole chicken breasts without skin, boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken until done, then set aside to cool.
2. In a large bowl, shred or cut the cooled chicken into bite-sized pieces. Add the raisins, mango cubes, and grapes, and mix well.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the Low Fat Blend, mango chutney, sour cream, curry powder, and parsley. Stir this mixture into the chicken until combined.
4. Chill the salad for at least 3 hours to allow flavors to meld.
5. Just before serving, stir in the pineapple. Serve over a bed of mixed greens.
